name: Deer Ridge Golf Club & Black Dog Tavern
about: Deer Ridge Golf Club & Black Dog Tavern features an indoor golf simulator alongside a full-service restaurant and event space. The venue offers a variety of activities including golf simulation, dining, and hosting special events such as weddings. The simulator allows play on multiple courses and mini-games with hourly rental options. The facility also includes a driving range, pro shop, and banquet spaces for various occasions. Membership options are available for those interested in regular access and discounts on food and merchandise.
why_golfers_like_it: Weather-independent golf play with a top-of-the-line simulator
Multiple course options and advanced metrics for game improvement
Flexible hourly rental pricing accommodating group sizes
On-site food and drink options for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full service restaurant with an extensive menu available on-site and online ordering
Full bar with craft beers available

simulator_hardware.notes: Top of the line golf simulator allowing play on hundreds of courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf equipment, but players are welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as allowed; the venue offers a full-service restaurant and bar with food and craft beers available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Timing varies depending on skill and experience with golf simulators, typically 1 hour per player.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with a full-service restaurant, outdoor patio, and activities suitable for various occasions.
